allow: PowerShell(Get-Content -Raw "C:\\Users\\giorg\\OneDrive\\Υπολογιστής\\salonicupPlatform\\schema.sql" | Set-Clipboard; Write-Output "Clipboard set. Length: $\(\(Get-Clipboard -Raw\).Length\) chars")

PowerShell($k = Get-Clipboard -Raw; if \($k -match '^sb_secret_'\) { Write-Output "OK secret key copied, length $\($k.Trim\(\).Length\)" } else { Write-Output "NOT a secret key. Starts with: $\($k.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(12,$k.Length\)\)\)" })
